kirundi.function_grapher_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Igikoresho co gushushanya fonction. Amahinguriro ya keyboard: 1 kugeza 6 bitoranya ubwoko bwa fonction, D derivée, A ubuso, T imbonerahamwe, L kwiga.
kirundi.where_the_function_crosses_the_y_axis_: Aho fonction inyura ku murongo y. Iyi ni agaciro ka f(0) — shiramwo gusa x = 0.
kirundi.the_derivative_measures_the_rate_of_ch: Derivée ipima igipimo c'impinduka. Yifungure kugira ngo urabe uko umanuko uhinduka ku fonction. Aho f′(x) = 0, fonction ifite agaciro gakomeye canke gato k'ahantu.
kirundi.the_shaded_area_represents_the_integra: Ahantu hijimye hagaragaza intégrale — «ihurizwahamwe» rusange rya f(x). Mu buzima nyabwo, ibi bishobora gusigura intera yagenzwe, ingufu zakoreshejwe, canke ubushobozi.
kirundi.when_a_0_the_parabola_opens_up_when_a_: Iyo a > 0, parabole yugurura hejuru (⏣). Iyo a < 0, yugurura hasi (⏢). Sommet ni ingingo yo guhindukira. Gerageza guhindura 'a' kugira ngo urabe!
kirundi.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: hakoreshejwe amagambo yoroshe ya buri munsi n'interuro ngufi, nta magambo y'ubuhanga
kirundi.for_a_high_school_algebra_or_pre_calc_: ku munyeshure w'amashure yisumbuye muri algèbre canke pré-calcul, hamwe n'amagambo nka umanuko, aho inyura, sommet, période, na amplitude
kirundi.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Fyonda «Sigura» kugira ngo mwigisha AI asigure iyi fonction ku rwego rwo gusoma watoranije.
kirundi.sliders_for_amplitude_frequency_phase_: Sliders za amplitude, fréquence, phase. Iciciro discrète c'imimerere 5. Nta manota, nta kugaragaza.
kirundi.hypothesis_how_does_phase_shift_affect: Iciyumviro: Ni gute phase shift igira ingaruka ku muraba ugaragara?
kirundi.explain_how_each_parameter_shapes_a_si: Sigura uko buri paramètre ishushanya umuraba sinus.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_5_state_marker_no: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso discrète c'imimerere 5; nta manota y'umuraba; nta kugaragaza — ku bushake bw'igishushanyo.
